name: Dylan
text: Hey! Have you ever wondered what really happens after we throw something away?

name: Dylan
text: If we don’t recycle properly, a lot of waste ends up in landfills or even in the ocean.

name: Dylan
text: Recycling helps reduce the amount of trash that pollutes our environment.

name: Dylan
text: It also saves natural resources like trees, water, and minerals.

name: Dylan
text: Many materials can be transformed into new products instead of being thrown away.

name: Dylan
text: When everyone does their part, the impact becomes much bigger.

name: Dylan
text: So next time you sort your waste, remember: you’re helping protect the planet.
